guide.hierarchy_desc: Visualizing the layers of components and how they are composed to maintain a healthy architecture.
guide.hierarchy_rules_desc: Design rules for maintaining healthy dependencies in WIM UI.
guide.hierarchy_tiers_desc: WIM UI is designed with four tiers based on component complexity and role. This keeps dependencies unidirectional (top-down) and improves maintainability.
guide.composition_map_desc: Mapping of which components major components use (wrap) internally. By combining lower-tier components, we provide consistent functionality.
guide.principles_desc: In WIM UI, we follow these principles to maintain consistency in DOM management and motion.
